en-US.network.adapter.name: Network Adapter
en-US.network.adapter.capability.tcp.name: TCP (Client)
en-US.network.adapter.capability.tcp.descripti: TCP client connection to a remote host
en-US.network.adapter.capability.udp.name: UDP (Socket)
en-US.network.adapter.capability.udp.descripti: UDP socket bound locally and connected to a remote endpoint
en-US.network.adapter.capability.tcpServer.des: TCP server listener; each accepted client becomes a session
en-US.network.adapter.capability.udpListen.des: UDP listener; each peer becomes a session
en-US.network.adapter.connect.tcp.title: Connect (TCP)
en-US.network.adapter.connect.udp.title: Connect (UDP)
en-US.network.adapter.connect.tcpServer.title: Listen (TCP Server)
en-US.network.adapter.connect.udpListen.title: Listen (UDP)

zh-CN.network.adapter.name: 网络适配器
zh-CN.network.adapter.capability.tcp.name: TCP（客户端）
zh-CN.network.adapter.capability.tcp.descripti: TCP 客户端连接到远端主机
zh-CN.network.adapter.capability.udp.name: UDP（套接字）
zh-CN.network.adapter.capability.udp.descripti: 本地绑定并连接到远端端点的 UDP 套接字
zh-CN.network.adapter.capability.tcpServer.des: TCP 服务端监听；每个接入客户端都是一个会话
zh-CN.network.adapter.capability.udpListen.des: UDP 监听；每个对端都是一个会话
zh-CN.network.adapter.connect.tcp.title: 连接（TCP）
zh-CN.network.adapter.connect.udp.title: 连接（UDP）
zh-CN.network.adapter.connect.tcpServer.title: 监听（TCP 服务端）
zh-CN.network.adapter.connect.udpListen.title: 监听（UDP）
